message:
fix(models): update HuggingFace model paths after repo restructuring

HuggingFace restructured the sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 repo,
moving ONNX models from root to onnx/ subdirectory. This caused 404 errors
when downloading the model.

Changes:
- Update revision from e4ce9877 to c9745ed1 (latest)
- Update model path from 'model.onnx' to 'onnx/model.onnx'
- Update checksums and sizes for all changed files
- Add ModelFile::local_name() to extract basename for local storage
  (so onnx/model.onnx downloads to model.onnx locally)
- Add test for local_name() method
- Fix test_check_version_mismatch_none to use manifest revision dynamically

The model file is now larger (90MB vs 22MB) as HuggingFace now provides
the full-precision model instead of a quantized version.

Fixes #35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
